'''Barresin''' was a small company that manufactured combat [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]]. They produced the [["Deathhawk" combat airspeeder]].<ref name="Goroth" />

*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
